name: BackToNest BVN5 Garden Birds Nest Box
description: BackToNest Bird Nest For Sparrow, Kingfisher And Humming Bird Description This Bird House Is Specially Made For Sparrow, Kingfisher, Hummingbirds And Other Tony Birds. It Is Proudly Made In India. Made With Wooden Sheets. It IS Also Comes With Wall Patching And Hanging Features So That We Can Easily Hang It In Terrace, Balcony Or Garden. The Design Of Bird House Is Also Useful To Attract Various Species Of birds. Appearance Bird Nest Is Specially Designed In House Shape So That Birds Can Easily See It From So Far And Use It To Make Their Life Easy And Peaceful.We Can Also Use It For Decoration
